notes: ITEMS IN THE 'items' ARRAY ARE WHAT GETS RENDERED.
Order does not matter — news-loader.js sorts by timestamp DESC.
Newest items appear first in both the ticker (top 3) and full feed.
Required fields per item: id, type, timestamp, headline, body, team, tweet.
Optional: tag, stat_change.
type values: 'upgrade' | 'downgrade' | 'new_team' | 'result' | 'paddock'
upgrade  = green left bar + ⬆ icon (stat went up)
downgrade= red left bar + ⬇ icon (stat went down)
new_team = gold left bar + 🆕 icon (joining grid)
result   = blue left bar + 🏁 icon (post-race recap)
paddock  = chrome left bar + 📰 icon (editorial / commentary / power rankings)
team object: { ticker, name, color, logo }
- ticker: '$BRETT', '$DOGE', etc.
- name: full team name (e.g. 'BRETT IS BACK')
- color: hex color used for the card accent (matches grid)
- logo: filename in same dir (e.g. 'brett.png'). REQUIRED for the
floating bottom-right meme avatar. If a logo is missing,
the card falls back to a gold ticker badge.
stat_change object (optional, only for upgrade/downgrade):
{ stat: 'ENGINE'|'AERO'|'CHASSIS'|'DRAG'|'PIT', from: number, to: number }
tweet: the exact copy that gets pushed to clipboard / pre-filled in X intent.
Keep under 280 chars. Use \n for line breaks. Add '$TICKER' for crypto refs.
TO ADD A NEW ITEM: append to the 'items' array, save the file. Done.

items.headline: OFFICIAL TEAM 10 — $PUP JOINS THE GRID
items.body: PUP POWER locked in as the tenth official team for Season 2. The mirrored BNB — community since 2021, Binance Alpha-listed, fully circulating supply. Driver: PUP. Car: BNB-01. Livery: ALPHA YELLOW. Starting profile: 5.8 overall — three-way tie for P1 entering the pre-season jockey. Verified credentials, real on-chain stats, real community.
items.tweet:
🏁 OFFICIAL TEAM 10 — @pupbnbchain

$PUP — the mirrored #BNB — joins the grid.

DRIVER: PUP
CAR: BNB-01
LIVERY: ALPHA YELLOW

Binance Alpha-listed. Community since 2021. Keep BUILDin'.

memegrandprix.com/teams-pup.html

lights out · june 1.

$MEMEGP

items.headline: OFFICIAL TEAM 8 — $MARS JOINS THE GRID
items.body: MARS RACING locked in as the eighth official team for Season 2 — signal detected, origin unknown. Driver: EELON. Livery: DEEP SPACE, alien cyclops energy with cyan signal accents. Starting profile: 4.2 overall — small-cap challenger with paddock-grade signal: followed by @MyDogeCEO, verified community, recursive Doginals heritage. Real on-chain stats. Real partnership.

items.headline: OFFICIAL TEAM 1 — $TURBO JOINS THE GRID
items.body: AI TURBO RACING locked in as the inaugural team for Season 2 — auto-promoted from the most engaged community of the Season 1 build-up. Driver: The Frog. Livery: TURBO BLUE, built by AI. Starting profile: 7.7 overall — a perfect DRAG 10.0 (highest on the grid) paired with a benchmark-setting ENGINE 9.5. Real on-chain stats. Community joined via Season 1 engagement.
